channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SATTRIX] Sattrix Information Security Ltd Secures License & Firewall Services Contract from Global Tier – 1 Enterprise for Rs. 2.65 Crores
item.description:
Sattrix Information Security Limited has announced that it has received work orders to supply License & Firewall Services from a Global Tier – 1 Enterprise. The contract is worth Rs. 2,65,09,006/- (Rupees Two Crore Sixty-Five Lakh Nine Thousand Six), exclusive of applicable taxes. The contract is to be executed over a period of 1 year. The order does not involve any related party transactions and none of the promoters or promoter group have any interest in the entity that awarded the order.

  • Sattrix Information Security Ltd has secured a contract worth Rs. 2.65 Crores from a Global Tier – 1 Enterprise.
  • The contract is for the supply of License & Firewall Services.
  • The contract period is 1 year.
  • The contract value is Rs. 2,65,09,006/- exclusive of applicable taxes.
  • The order does not involve any related party transactions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sattrix Information Security Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ASHIANA] Ashiana Housing Faces ₹4,95,696 CGST Act Demand Over Alleged Wrong Input Tax Credit
item.description:
Ashiana Housing Ltd. has received a demand order from the GST Department, Jaipur, under the CGST Act 2017, amounting to ₹4,95,696, including interest and penalty. The demand is related to the alleged wrong availment of Input Tax Credit on units sold/supplied after the issuance of the completion certificate of Ashiana Umang Phase IV in Jaipur. The company will contest this order and file an appeal. No significant impact on financial or operational performance has been observed, and the company is reviewing and reconciling its records regarding the monetary implications.

  • Ashiana Housing Ltd. has received a demand order under the CGST Act 2017 for ₹4,95,696, including interest and penalty.
  • The demand is related to the alleged wrong availment of Input Tax Credit on units sold/supplied after the issuance of the completion certificate of Ashiana Umang Phase IV in Jaipur.
  • The company will contest the order and file an appeal.
  • No significant impact on financial or operational performance has been observed.
  • The company is reviewing and reconciling its records regarding the monetary implications.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASHIANA HOUSING LTD.-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [NFL] National Fertilizers Ltd Transfers 6191 Equity Shares to Investor Education and Protection Fund
item.description:
In accordance with Section 124 of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority (Accounting, Audit, Transfer and Refund) Rules, 2016, National Fertilizers Ltd has transferred 6191 equity shares to the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority. The shares were transferred from National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL). This move is in line with the company's commitment to comply with applicable provisions of the law and to contribute to investor education and protection.

  • National Fertilizers Ltd transfers 6191 equity shares to Investor Education and Protection Fund
  • Transfer in accordance with Section 124 of the Companies Act, 2013 and the Investor Education and Protection Fund Authority Rules, 2016
  • Shares transferred from National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL)
  • Move highlights company's commitment to comply with applicable laws
  • Contribution to investor education and protection

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NATIONAL FERTILIZERS LTD. | Category: Other

item.title: [WARRENTEA] Warren Tea Ltd Discloses Shareholding Pattern as of 31st March, 2026
item.description:
Warren Tea Ltd, a company listed on BSE Limited, has disclosed its shareholding pattern as of 31st March, 2026. The disclosure is pursuant to Regulation 30(2) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The holding of Vinay Kumar Goenka, Vinay Kumar Goenka (HUF), Vivek Goenka, Maple Hotels & Resorts Ltd., and Sectra Plaza Pvt. Ltd. is 66.02% of the total voting rights of the company. The disclosure does not include any encumbrances directly or indirectly on the shares of Warren Tea Limited.

  • Warren Tea Ltd discloses its shareholding pattern as of 31st March, 2026
  • Vinay Kumar Goenka, Vinay Kumar Goenka (HUF), Vivek Goenka, Maple Hotels & Resorts Ltd., and Sectra Plaza Pvt. Ltd. hold 66.02% of the total voting rights
  • No encumbrances directly or indirectly on the shares of Warren Tea Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WARREN TEA LTD.-$ | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KANSAINER] Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd Announces Revised Board of Directors
item.description:
Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd has announced a revised list of Board of Directors with effect from 1st April, 2026. This change is following the resignation of Mr. Hirokazu Kotera as Executive Director, who was nominated by the Promoter Company, Kansai Paint Co. Ltd., Japan. The resignation is due to directions from the Promoter Company.

  • Kansai Nerolac Paints Ltd announces a revised list of Board of Directors
  • Resignation of Mr. Hirokazu Kotera as Executive Director
  • Resignation due to directions from Promoter Company, Kansai Paint Co. Ltd., Japan
  • New Board of Directors list effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Revision follows SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KANSAI NEROLAC PAINTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PNCINFRA] PNC Infratech Ltd: Promoter Group Members Acquire Shares Through Off-Market Transfers
item.description:
PNC Infratech Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. Meena Jain, Chakresh Kumar Jain, Madhavi Jain, and Ashita Jain (collectively, 'Transferees') have acquired an aggregate of 1,96,08,000 equity shares of the company from Pradeep Kumar Jain HUF, Chakresh Kumar Jain HUF, and Yogesh Kumar Jain HUF (collectively, 'Transferors') through off-market transfers. The transfers are inter-se among members of the promoter group of the company. The acquisition was made pursuant to the partition of the Transferors.

  • PNC Infratech Ltd receives disclosure under Regulation 10(6) of SEBI Takeover Regulations, 2011.
  • Meena Jain, Chakresh Kumar Jain, Madhavi Jain, and Ashita Jain acquire shares from Pradeep Kumar Jain HUF, Chakresh Kumar Jain HUF, and Yogesh Kumar Jain HUF.
  • The acquisition was made through off-market transfers pursuant to the partition of the Transferors.
  • The Transferees and Transferors are all members of the promoter group of PNC Infratech Ltd.
  • The transaction does not require an open offer as per Regulation 10(1)(a)(ii) of the Takeover Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNC Infratech Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SJCORP] SJ Corporation Ltd: Savji Patel Declares Decreased Holding of 7.21% Equity Shares
item.description:
SJ Corporation Ltd has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from Savji Patel. The disclosure pertains to the decreased holding of 7.21% equity shares due to the allotment of equity shares on a preferential basis to proposed promoters and non-promoters of the company.

  • Savji Patel declares decreased holding of 7.21% equity shares in SJ Corporation Ltd.
  • The decrease is due to the allotment of equity shares on a preferential basis to proposed promoters and non-promoters.
  • The total equity share capital of the company is now Rs. 4,33,55,000 divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares of Re. 1/- each.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the TC after the said acquisition/sale is Rs. 4,33,55,000 divided into 4,33,55,000 equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SJ CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DESCO] Desco Infratech Ltd. Secures Enhanced Credit Facilities from YES Bank Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Desco Infratech Ltd. has announced the receipt of enhanced credit facilities from YES Bank Limited, which includes an increase in the working capital facilities such as Bank Guarantee and Cash Credit. The existing sanctioned limit of Rs. 11.25 Cr has been increased to Rs. 18.00 Cr. This enhancement will strengthen the company's liquidity position, improve operational efficiency, and support its growth and expansion plans.

  • Desco Infratech Ltd. has received sanction for enhanced credit facilities from YES Bank Limited.
  • The enhanced facilities include an increase in working capital facilities such as Bank Guarantee and Cash Credit.
  • The existing sanctioned limit of Rs. 11.25 Cr has been increased to Rs. 18.00 Cr.
  • This enhancement will strengthen the company's liquidity position and improve its operational efficiency.
  • The increased credit facilities will support the company's growth and expansion plans.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Desco Infratech Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [SILVERTUC] Promoter Vipul Haridas Thakkar Acquires 40,300 Equity Shares of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd on Open Market
item.description:
Vipul Haridas Thakkar, Promoter and Managing Director of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd, has acquired 40,300 equity shares of the company on the open market. The acquisition took place on 30th March, 2026. The total equity share capital of the company is Rs. 25,36,20,000 divided into 12,68,10,000 equity shares of Re. 2/- each.

  • Vipul Haridas Thakkar, Promoter and Managing Director, acquired 40,300 equity shares of Silver Touch Technologies Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made on the open market on 30th March, 2026.
  • The total equity share capital of the company is Rs. 25,36,20,000 divided into 12,68,10,000 equity shares of Re. 2/- each.
  • The acquisition increased Mr. Thakkar's holding to 2,59,01,630 shares, representing approximately 20.45% of the total voting rights.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Silver Touch Technologies Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IRMENERGY] IRM Trust Acquires 276286 Shares of IRM Energy, Increasing Promoter Group's Holding to 50.74%
item.description:
IRM Trust, a promoter of IRM Energy, has purchased 276286 equity shares of the company. This acquisition has increased the promoter and promoter group's shareholding from 50.07% (20558773 equity shares) to 50.74% (20835059 equity shares). The acquisition was made on the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

  • IRM Trust, a promoter of IRM Energy, has acquired 276286 equity shares of the company.
  • This acquisition has increased the promoter and promoter group's shareholding from 50.07% to 50.74%.
  • The acquisition was made on the Bombay Stock Exchange Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRM Energy Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
